title: Distichorchis pachyantha
taxonomy: Distichorchis pachyantha is classified as a species within the family Orchidaceae. It belongs to the genus Distichorchis. This orchid is native to the tropical regions of Asia, specifically in the islands of the Indo-Pacific. The species is further classified into the subfamily Epidendroideae and tribe Coelogyneae. Classification of plants can be complex and is often subject to ongoing research and revision.
